scientific_integrity.detail: No fabricated statistics, p-values, or citations were produced across all evaluated outputs; all claims trace to input data or documented tool behavior.

practice_boundaries.detail: All outputs remained within biostatistics and data visualization scope; no unsupported clinical or diagnostic recommendations were made.

methodological_ground.detail: No methodological fallacies detected; outputs apply standard approaches appropriate to biostatistics and data visualization tasks.

code_usability.detail: Generated code executed without syntax errors or unresolvable dependency failures across all tested inputs.

functional_suitability.note: Pagination for >6 groups now documented with named output convention; single-arm labeled as 'All patients'

reliability.note: Fallback template present; pagination branch adds robustness for stress cases; stress-case checklist updated

performance_context.note: references/parameters.md offloads detail; SKILL.md is 150 lines — well-sized

agent_usability.note: Pagination workflow branch now documented; style override documentation mandated in Assumptions; all v1 gaps closed

human_usability.note: Description naturally discoverable for clinical researchers; trigger language precise

security.note: Local file I/O only; no credential handling; CSV column name injection not addressed

maintainability.note: references/parameters.md offloads detail; clean script separation; all fixes applied cleanly

agent_specific.note: Pagination branch closes the >6 groups gap; escape hatches strong; composability still limited by file-path coupling

key_strengths: Journal-specific style support (NEJM, Lancet, JCO) directly addresses publication submission requirements
Pagination workflow branch for >6 groups with named output convention closes the primary v1 gap
Single-arm 'All patients' label and mandatory style-override documentation in Assumptions improve output traceability
Combined figure mode (--combine) reduces post-processing steps for manuscript preparation
Fallback template includes lifelines install command, minimizing environment setup friction

recommendations.title: Fallback not explicitly wired to pagination failure path
recommendations.problem: The pagination workflow branch does not explicitly state that the Fallback Template should be invoked if pagination fails, leaving a minor gap in error handling coverage.
recommendations.root_cause: Fallback Template is documented for script failures but not for pagination-specific failures.
recommendations.fix: Add to the Group count check paragraph: 'If pagination fails, invoke the Fallback Template with Blocked Steps noting the pagination error.'

recommendations.title: CSV column name injection not addressed
recommendations.problem: User-provided column names (--time-col, --event-col, --group-col) are passed to the script without sanitization, creating a minor injection surface.
recommendations.root_cause: Security section does not address column name validation.
recommendations.fix: Add to Error Handling: validate that column name parameters contain only alphanumeric characters, underscores, and hyphens before passing to the script.
